column1: # Diagnosis input CSV. One *group* per data line.
#   - Each data line is one logical diagnosis step:
#     The host sends every SW command in order (CR appended automatically),
#     reads one reply line per SW (typically "OK"/"FAIL").
#   - After all SW in the group, the host runs three measure paths (s1/s2/s3). Before **each** path it runs
#     a 6-step dark/light precheck (SW3/SW1 + pd/opm, 1s before each pd/opm read), then that path:
#     SW 3 1 (select source), matching WL, then pd/opm. Precheck: SW 3 1 2; SW 3 1 (1
#     and SW 1 2 (m-1)/m where n,m are the first SW 1 1 n and SW 1 2 m in this group (ports must be >= 2).
#     One reply line is read after each command (3×6 precheck replies + three paths = 18 + 9 exchanges after CSV SW).
#   - Lines starting with '#' or ';' are comments. The trimmed text after
#     the marker is attached as the *label* of the next data line (used for
#     reporting only; not sent over serial).
#   - UTF-8 BOM on the first line is tolerated.
#   If the log has an older header (7 or 13 columns), delete or rename output\diagnosis_log.csv once.
